free_text: Quasifree knockout in O-16(p,2p)N-15 at an incident
arranged in an inplane configuration with one telescope
on a movable arm on one side of the beam,and the other
two telescopes (separated by 15 degrees) mounted on a
second movable arm which covered an angular range of 50
to 70 degrees on the other side. Double-aperture brass
collimators in front of each detector telescope (1-mm
Si surface-barrier detector, followed by 51-mm diameter
by 127-mm-long NaI crystal-phototube assembly with a
thin entrance window) defined the effective target
The oxygen gas ( >99.9% purity, 99.8%  O-16) was
contained in a cylindrical gas cell of diameter 10 cm
and height 4 cm, with entrance and exit windows of
differential cross section for the individual residual
states plotted as a function of the kinetic energy of
one of the detected protons are given in data-section.
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. Subents 002-031 merged.
No information about source of uncertainty
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
E-ERR -> E-ERR-DIG. Data from Subents 003-031 added.
